audit_items.proof_trace: All AuctionBidder state-changing functions are guarded by role-based access control: `bid()` requires AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE, `auctionCallback()` requires `msg.sender == s_auction`, and admin functions require DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE — none of which an arbitrary external call target can satisfy. The only dangerous re-entry path (back into BaseAuction.bid()) is blocked by the `s_entered` mutex set at L418 of BaseAuction.sol, which remains true for the entire duration of the callback window including the `_multiCall` execution.
